question: Does the generated avatar retain the short, straight black bob hairstyle of the subject in the first reference image?
Does the avatar wear black-framed glasses, consistent with the subject reference?
Is the subject's facial identity (e.g., Asian features, face shape) recognizable in the generated avatar?
Does the image exhibit a 3D-modeled or CGI avatar aesthetic rather than a photorealistic style?
Does the color palette prominently feature neon pinks, purples, and blues consistent with the cyberpunk style reference?
Does the background depict a futuristic city with neon signage or high-tech architecture?
Is the subject positioned on the left side of the frame, leaning on a railing or balcony, strictly following the composition of the third reference image?
Does the perspective simulate a high-angle view looking down into a deep city canyon, matching the depth cues of the third reference image?
Is there visible colored lighting (e.g., neon reflections) cast onto the avatar's face, as requested in the instruction?
Is the image free from severe anatomical distortions (e.g., warped face, malformed hands) and rendering artifacts?
